
```{r load-packages, message = FALSE}
library(knitr)
library(tidyverse)
library(broom)
library(htmltools)
```

```{r setup, include = FALSE}
opts_chunk$set(echo=FALSE) # hide source code in the document
```

```{r load_data, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

file_path <- "~/Downloads/kiva_loans.csv"

kiva <- read_csv(
  file_path,
  col_select = c(
    funded_amount,
    loan_amount,
    sector,
    borrower_genders,
    repayment_interval,
    term_in_months
  ),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

kiva <- kiva %>%
  filter(
    !is.na(funded_amount),
    !is.na(loan_amount),
    loan_amount > 0
  ) %>%
  mutate(
    SuccessRate = funded_amount / loan_amount,
    SuccessRate = ifelse(SuccessRate > 1, 1, SuccessRate),
    
    FundingSuccess = ifelse(
      funded_amount >= loan_amount,
      "Fully funded",
      "Not fully funded"
    ),
    
    gender_clean = case_when(
      is.na(borrower_genders) ~ "Unknown",
      borrower_genders == "" ~ "Unknown",
      borrower_genders == "female" ~ "Female",
      borrower_genders == "male" ~ "Male",
      TRUE ~ "Group"
    )
  )

```

```{r}
library(ggplot2)

kiva_sector <- data.frame(
  sector = c("Manufacturing", "Arts", "Wholesale", "Education", "Personal Use",
             "Construction", "Food", "Health", "Agriculture", "Retail",
             "Clothing", "Services", "Transportation", "Housing", "Entertainment"),
  AverageSuccessRate = c(99.5, 98.7, 98.6, 98.6, 97.8,
                         97.0, 96.8, 96.0, 95.8, 95.6,
                         95.2, 94.7, 94.0, 94.0, 88.7)
)

ggplot(kiva_sector,
       aes(x = AverageSuccessRate,
           y = reorder(sector, AverageSuccessRate))) +
  geom_col(fill = "#F48FB1", width = 0.75) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", AverageSuccessRate)),
    hjust = -0.15,
    size = 4
  ) +
  scale_x_continuous(
    breaks = seq(86, 100, by = 2)
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(85, 100.5)) +
  labs(
    title = "Average Success Rate by Sector",
    x = "Average Success Rate (%)",
    y = NULL,
    caption = "SuccessRate = funded_amount / loan_amount, capped at 1"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", size = 18, hjust = 0.5),
    axis.text.y = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text.x = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.title.x = element_text(size = 13),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank(),
    plot.caption = element_text(hjust = 0, color = "gray", size = 9)
  )
```
```{r funding_success_binary_chart, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# יצירת עמודת הצלחה
kiva <- kiva %>%
  mutate(
    FundingSuccess = ifelse(
      funded_amount >= loan_amount,
      "Fully funded",
      "Not fully funded"
    )
  )

# סיכום אחוזים
success_summary <- kiva %>%
  count(FundingSuccess) %>%
  mutate(
    Percent = n / sum(n) * 100
  )

# התרשים
ggplot(success_summary,
       aes(x = FundingSuccess, y = Percent)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#F48FB1", width = 0.65) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", Percent)),
    vjust = -0.4,
    size = 5
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
  labs(
    title = "Funding Success in Kiva Loans",
    x = NULL,
    y = "Percentage of Loans (%)",
    caption = "FundingSuccess = funded_amount >= loan_amount"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

```

```{r loan_amount_control_chart, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# יצירת משתנה הצלחה
kiva <- kiva %>%
  mutate(
    SuccessRate = funded_amount / loan_amount,
    SuccessRate = ifelse(SuccessRate > 1, 1, SuccessRate)
  )

# סיכום לפי קבוצות של גובה ההלוואה
loan_amount_summary <- kiva %>%
  mutate(
    loan_amount_group = cut(
      loan_amount,
      breaks = c(0, 250, 500, 1000, 2000, Inf),
      labels = c("0-250", "251-500", "501-1000", "1001-2000", "2000+")
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(loan_amount_group)) %>%
  group_by(loan_amount_group) %>%
  summarise(
    AverageSuccessRate = mean(SuccessRate) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# התרשים
ggplot(loan_amount_summary,
       aes(x = loan_amount_group, y = AverageSuccessRate)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#F8BBD0", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", AverageSuccessRate)),
    vjust = -0.4,
    size = 4
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(85, 100)) +
  labs(
    title = "Average Success Rate by Loan Amount",
    x = "Loan Amount Group",
    y = "Average Success Rate (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

```
```{r repayment_interval_chart, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
repayment_summary <- kiva %>%
  filter(!is.na(repayment_interval)) %>%
  group_by(repayment_interval) %>%
  summarise(
    AverageSuccessRate = mean(SuccessRate) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>%
  arrange(AverageSuccessRate)

ggplot(repayment_summary,
       aes(x = AverageSuccessRate,
           y = reorder(repayment_interval, AverageSuccessRate))) +
  geom_col(fill = "#F8BBD0", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", AverageSuccessRate)),
    hjust = -0.15,
    size = 4
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(xlim = c(85, 100.5)) +
  labs(
    title = "Average Success Rate by Repayment Interval",
    x = "Average Success Rate (%)",
    y = NULL
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    panel.grid.major.y = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

```


```{r term_in_months_chart, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(readr)
library(dplyr)
library(ggplot2)

# קריאת הקובץ מהורדות
file_path <- "~/Downloads/kiva_loans.csv"

kiva_term <- read_csv(
  file_path,
  col_select = c(funded_amount, loan_amount, term_in_months),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

# יצירת SuccessRate וסיכום לפי משך ההלוואה
term_summary <- kiva_term %>%
  filter(!is.na(funded_amount),
         !is.na(loan_amount),
         !is.na(term_in_months),
         loan_amount > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    SuccessRate = funded_amount / loan_amount,
    SuccessRate = ifelse(SuccessRate > 1, 1, SuccessRate),
    term_group = cut(
      term_in_months,
      breaks = c(0, 6, 12, 24, 60, Inf),
      labels = c("0-6", "7-12", "13-24", "25-60", "60+")
    )
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(term_group)) %>%
  group_by(term_group) %>%
  summarise(
    AverageSuccessRate = mean(SuccessRate) * 100,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# התרשים
ggplot(term_summary,
       aes(x = term_group, y = AverageSuccessRate)) +
  geom_col(fill = "#F8BBD0", width = 0.7) +
  geom_text(
    aes(label = sprintf("%.1f%%", AverageSuccessRate)),
    vjust = -0.4,
    size = 4
  ) +
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(85, 100.5)) +
  labs(
    title = "Average Success Rate by Loan Term",
    x = "Term in Months",
    y = "Average Success Rate (%)"
  ) +
  theme_minimal(base_size = 14) +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(face = "bold", hjust = 0.5),
    panel.grid.major.x = element_blank(),
    panel.grid.minor = element_blank()
  )

```
```{r data_cleaning, echo=FALSE, message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(readr)
library(dplyr)

file_path <- "~/Downloads/kiva_loans.csv"

kiva <- read_csv(
  file_path,
  col_select = c(
    funded_amount,
    loan_amount,
    sector,
    borrower_genders,
    repayment_interval,
    term_in_months
  ),
  show_col_types = FALSE
)

cleaned_data <- kiva %>%
  filter(!is.na(funded_amount),
         !is.na(loan_amount),
         loan_amount > 0) %>%
  mutate(
    SuccessRate = funded_amount / loan_amount,
    SuccessRate = ifelse(SuccessRate > 1, 1, SuccessRate),
    
    FundingSuccess = ifelse(
      funded_amount >= loan_amount,
      "Fully funded",
      "Not fully funded"
    ),
    
    gender_clean = case_when(
      is.na(borrower_genders) ~ "Unknown",
      borrower_genders == "" ~ "Unknown",
      borrower_genders == "female" ~ "Female",
      borrower_genders == "male" ~ "Male",
      TRUE ~ "Group"
    )
  )

```
